headline: Trump 😎🇺🇸 'GOOD' Iran Chats 💋🛢️ – Markets MOON 🚀📈 No Nuke BBQ 💥☢️
text:
Trump 🍊🕶️ dropping MORNING WOOD 🪵📱 Truth Social BOMB 💣 at DAWN 🌅 – 'GOOD' 😏🔥 & 'PRODUCTIVE' 🤝 PRODUCTIVE TALKS with Iran 👳‍♂️🕌 SLAYING market PANIC 😱💥! No OBLITERATING 🧨⚡ power plants or ENERGY INFRA 🍑🛢️ for 5 DAYS ⏳⏳⏳⏳⏳ cuz STRAIT OF HORMUZ 🚪🌊 stays OPEN like a VIP lounge 🕺🍆 – after threatening to YEET 'EM into OBLIVION 🌋💨 unless Persians cough up the keys 🔑! Iran SIMPS 🤡👎 DENY any CONTACT 😤🚫 – 'FAKE NEWS' screams parliamentary boss Ghalibaf 📢📰 like MTG on steroids 💪🍑!

Palm Beach glow-up ☀️🏖️: Trump BRAGGING 🤠 'BOTH SIDES WANNA DEAL 💰🤝 – US got THICC 🥵 RELATIONSHIPS 👯‍♂️ with MIDEAST DADDIES 👑🕌!' But WHO? Crickets 🦗😶. Special envoy STEVE WITKOFF 🕴️💼 + son-in-law JARED KUSHNER 👨‍💼🍆 in the MIX 🥤 – chatting BALLISTIC MISSILES 🚀🍆, URANIUM ENRICHMENT ☢️💦, or just CEASEFIRE 🕊️❌? Trump in MEMPHIS 🎸🥁 SPILLS: 'Iran AGREED NO NUKE WEAPON ☢️🚫!' – Persians like 'NAH BRO' 🤷‍♂️😏 NO CONFIRM 😂.

'I GOT 99% CHANCE OF DEAL 🎲💯 – GIVING 5 DAYS THEN BOOM 💥📈!' Trump ROASTS: Wiped out IRAN LEADERSHIP TIERS 🥊💀 – 'HARD TO FIND PEEPS TO TALK CUZ THEY KEEP DYING 😂⚰️!' But CNBC Joe Kernen 📺☎️ catches him SLIPPING: 'STILL GOT REPS LEFT 🧑‍💼👀 – ACTING DIFFERENT THAN DEAD PREDECESSORS 👻😈!' Kernen: 'REGIME CHANGE VIA OWNAGE? 🏆🔥' Iran Fars News IRGC simp 📰🛡️ calls it WIN 🏅 – 'Trump BACKED DOWN 🐔😩 after our RETALIATORY THREATS 🧨🛢️!'

RUSE ALERT 🚨🤥? Like last summer's MIDNIGHT HAMMER 🛠️💣 – talks 'ON' til BOMBS RAINED 🌧️☢️ on nuke sites! Trump MYSTERY MAN 🕵️‍♂️🧠: 'My BRAIN = BLACK BOX ✈️🔒!' Scant DEETS but FUTURES RALLIED 📈🚀 OIL PRICES TANKED ⛽📉 – dismal day FLIPPED to HOPEGLIMMER ✨😍! Timed PERFECT before Wall Street bell 🔔💰 – no MONDAY BOMBING DEADLINE DOOM 🌑💥, just 5-DAY CHILL PILL 💊❄️.

Breakthrough or TIME-BUY STALL? 🤔🕐 US-Israel airstrikes KEEP BANGING 🔫✈️? Hormuz STILL CLOGGED 🚪🚫? Trump in DIFFICULT SPOT 😬🔥 looking for OUT 🏃‍♂️💨 – but markets SIMPING HARD 🤤📈 for PEACE PUMP 🍆🕊️! Operation Epic Fury ⚡😤 cooling to DEAL ORGY 💦🤝? Wall Street Cucks 🐔💸 BREATHING EASY 😮‍💨🍃 – OIL DADDIES 🛢️👑 sweating less 😰➡️😌!
